headline: Iran-US framework to be signed Friday at Bürgenstock; Swiss mediation
summary: The US-Iran 14-point framework signed 2026-06-17; formal declaration of intent to be signed Friday 2026-06-19 at the Bürgenstock, with Swiss mediation.

headline: Federal Court annuls Grenchen mayoral election over counting errors
summary: The Federal Court declared Susanne Sahli's September election as Grenchen mayor invalid over serious counting errors; vote must be repeated.

headline: Swiss economy slowing amid US tariff threats and weak global growth
summary: Le Temps reports the Swiss economy decelerating under energy prices, US tariff threats and weak global growth.

headline: Ruth Dreifuss and 600 signatories urge Switzerland to act on Gaza aid
summary: Former Federal Councillor Ruth Dreifuss and 600 signatories call on Switzerland to act on Gaza humanitarian aid.

headline: Geneva bids farewell to Jean Ziegler at Cathedrale Saint-Pierre
summary: A farewell ceremony for sociologist Jean Ziegler held at Geneva's Cathedrale Saint-Pierre.

headline: Iran-US sign war-ending framework; 14-point text leaks
summary: Iran and the US signed a 14-point war-ending framework covering ceasefire, Strait of Hormuz and sanctions; Israel/Hezbollah buy-in unresolved.

headline: Niger says 35 killed in armed attack on Niamey airport
summary: Niger says 11 soldiers, 2 civilians and 22 attackers killed in an assault on Diori Hamani airport in Niamey.

headline: Colombia presidential run-off Sunday: Cepeda vs de la Espriella
summary: Colombia's run-off on 2026-06-21 pits leftist Ivan Cepeda against far-right Abelardo de la Espriella.

headline: UK convicts two men of spying for China in landmark case
summary: A UK court jailed Chung Biu Yuen and Chi Leung Wai, the first convicted of spying for China in Britain.

headline: Splunk Enterprise missing-auth flaw added to CISA KEV (CVE-2026-20253)
summary: CVE-2026-20253: unauthenticated file create/truncate via PostgreSQL sidecar in Splunk Enterprise; KEV-added 2026-06-18.

headline: Auth bypass in Google MCP Toolbox opaque-token validation (CVE-2026-11717/11718)
summary: Two 9.3 auth-bypass flaws in googleapis/mcp-toolbox OAuth introspection bypass opaque-token validation.

headline: Unauthenticated deserialization RCE in PTC Windchill/FlexPLM (CVE-2026-12569)
summary: CVE-2026-12569: critical unauthenticated deserialization RCE in PTC Windchill PDMLink and FlexPLM.

headline: Unauthenticated deserialization RCE in iba PDA/DatCoordinator (CVE-2026-8024)
summary: CVE-2026-8024: remote unauthenticated deserialization grants full access to ibaPDA/ibaDatCoordinator.

headline: FFmpeg MagicYUV decoder out-of-bounds write enables RCE (CVE-2026-8461)
summary: CVE-2026-8461: OOB write in FFmpeg libavcodec MagicYUV decoder, DoS and possible RCE, fixed in 8.1.2.

headline: Eclipse Theia AI chat agent prompt injection via filenames (CVE-2026-44688)
summary: CVE-2026-44688: malicious repo file/directory names injected into Eclipse Theia AI agent prompt context.

headline: Turing-RL: training user simulators with a Turing-test reward
summary: arXiv 2606.19336 trains LLM user simulators with a discriminative Turing reward judged by an LLM.

headline: UBP2: uncertainty-balanced exploration for preference-based RL
summary: arXiv 2606.19328 directs exploration via ensembles of reward, dynamics and value models for sample-efficient preference RL.

headline: Large Language Gibbs: structured probabilistic inference via LLM conditionals
summary: arXiv 2606.19264 uses an LLM's next-token conditionals as Gibbs transition operators for coherent structured inference.

headline: OmniAgent: active perception as a POMDP for efficient long-video understanding
summary: arXiv 2606.19341 frames video understanding as an observe-think-act loop scaling with query difficulty, not video length.

headline: NeSyCat Torch: differentiable categorical semantics for neurosymbolic learning
summary: arXiv 2606.19279 unifies classical, fuzzy, probabilistic and neural truth under one categorical framework with a tensor backend.
